General.Name: Huili Resources Group Ltd
General.Description: Huili Resources (Group) Limited, an investment holding, engages in mining, processing, and selling mineral ores in the People's Republic of China. The company engages in trading and processing of coal; coal service supply chain; and financial services. In addition, it provides technology consultation and other services, as well as operates solar energy facilities. The company was formerly known as Realty Resources (Group) Limited and changed its name to Huili Resources (Group) Limited in May 2010. Huili Resources (Group) Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.

4.Name: Mr. Lik Man  Sin FCCA, HKICPA
4.Title: Company Secretary
